summary: Resume builder app with styled section titles (glowing blue effect). Input fields/form elements have a visibility issue where they only appear on hover and turn invisible otherwise.
known_issues: Input fields and form elements are only visible on hover; they appear invisible/blank when not hovered due to CSS styling issues (border/background/text color blending into background)

existing_features.title: Fix all input fields, textareas, and select elements across all form section components (PersonalInfoSection, EducationSection, ExperienceSection, SkillsSection, ProjectsSection, CertificationsSection, ProfilePhotoSection) so they are always visually distinct and legible regardless of hover or focus state. Each field must have a consistently visible border, a non-transparent background that contrasts with the page background, and readable text color at all times — not just on hover.
